title: Fifth Hub Forum in Nicosia, Cyprus, to explore heritage as a vector for peace in the Mediterranean
content:
The European Heritage Hub is heading to Nicosia, Cyprus, for its upcoming Forum dedicated to the role of cultural heritage as a powerful tool for peacebuilding, reconciliation, and Euro-Mediterranean cooperation. The event will take place on Friday, 29 May from 14:00-18:00 EEST at the Central Hall of CYENS Centre of Excellence, Mayor Lellos Demetriades Square 1, Nicosia and be livestreamed via the Hub’s YouTube channel. 

The Hub Forum, entitled “Mare Nostrum: Fostering Peace through Heritage”,  is held in the framework of the EU-funded European Heritage Hub Preparatory Action, and organised by project leader Europa Nostra in collaboration with Europa Nostra Heritage Hub in Nicosia, with su

creator: Liv Martin
